sectionTitle: A Feast for the Eyes and Ears | 眼睛、耳朵的饗宴

samples.pinyin: Wángshì wéi guìbīn shè xiǎng yàn.

samples.pinyin: xiànshí yǔ lǐxiǎng yǒu chājù.
samples.en: Reality and ideals have a gap.
samples.vi: Thực tế và lý tưởng có sự khác biệt.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen yào jiēshòu xiànshí.
samples.en: We must accept reality.
samples.vi: Chúng ta phải chấp nhận thực tế.

samples.pinyin: zhège jìhuà hěn xiànshí.
samples.en: This plan is very practical.
samples.vi: Kế hoạch này rất thực tế.

samples.pinyin: tā de jiànyì hěn xiànshí.
samples.en: His suggestion is very practical.
samples.vi: Đề xuất của anh ấy rất thực dụng.

samples.pinyin: wǒ lèi de zhīchí bù zhùle.
samples.en: I'm so tired that i can't hold it anymore.

samples.pinyin: nǐ hái néng zhīchí duō cháng shíjiān?
samples.en: How long can you support?

samples.sentence: 他夢想成為一名科學傢。
samples.pinyin: tā mèngxiǎng chéngwéi yī míng kēxuéjiā.
samples.en: He dreams of becoming a scientist.

samples.pinyin: wǒ yīzhí mèngxiǎng xiě yī běn shū.
samples.en: I have always earnestly wished to write a book.

samples.meaning: dream; vainly hope; pipe dream; woolgathering
samples.pinyin: tā zǒng shì zài kètáng shàng mèngxiǎng.
samples.en: He is always woolgathering in class.

samples.meaning: dream; vainly hope; pipe dream; woolgathering
samples.sentence: 他的夢想是成為科學傢。
samples.pinyin: tā de mèngxiǎng shì chéngwéi kēxuéjiā.
samples.en: His dream is to become a scientist.

samples.meaning: even; even if; even though; no matter how
samples.pinyin: nǎpà xià yǔ, wǒ yě yào qù.
samples.en: Even if it rains, I will go.

samples.meaning: even; even if; even though; no matter how
samples.sentence: 哪怕很睏難，我也會堅持。
samples.pinyin: nǎpà hěn kùnnán, wǒ yě huì jiānchí.
samples.en: Even though it’s difficult, I will persevere.

samples.pinyin: tā yǒnggǎn de tiǎozhànle duìshǒu.
samples.en: He bravely challenged his opponent.

samples.pinyin: qǐyè xiàng jìngzhēng duìshǒu tiǎozhàn.
samples.en: Businesses are challenging competitors.

samples.pinyin: wǒ yào kèfú nèixīn de kǒngjù.
samples.en: I am determined to overcome my fear.
samples.vi: Tôi phải vượt qua nỗi sợ của mình.

samples.pinyin: tāmen kèfúle yǔyán zhàng'ài.
samples.en: They overcame the language barrier.
samples.vi: Họ đã vượt qua rào cản ngôn ngữ.

samples.meaning: crisis; barrier; tight; difficulty; obstacle; squeeze
samples.pinyin: péngyou bāngzhù tā dùguò nánguān.
samples.en: His friends helped him get through the tough time.
samples.vi: Bạn bè đã giúp anh ấy vượt qua khó khăn.

samples.meaning: crisis; barrier; tight; difficulty; obstacle; squeeze
samples.pinyin: wǒmen yīqǐ kèfúle nánguān.
samples.en: We overcame the difficult situation together.
samples.vi: Chúng ta đã cùng nhau vượt qua khó khăn.

samples.pinyin: zhège xiàngmù zhídé tóuzī.
samples.en: This project is worth investing in.
samples.vi: Hạng mục này xứng đáng đầu tư.

samples.pinyin: zhè bù diànyǐng zhídé tuījiàn.
samples.en: This movie is definitely worth watching.
samples.vi: Bộ phim này đáng để giới thiệu.

samples.pinyin: zhè shì yī jiàn zhídé de shìqíng.
samples.en: This is something worth doing.
samples.vi: Đây là một điều đáng giá

samples.sentence: 他做齣這樣值得的選擇。
samples.pinyin: tā zuò chū zhèyàng zhídé de xuǎnzé.
samples.en: He made a very wise choice.
samples.vi: Anh ấy đưa ra một lựa chọn đáng giá.

samples.pinyin: yǎnchū jiéshù, quánchǎng hècǎi.
samples.en: The performance ended and the whole audience gave acclaim.

samples.sentence: 全場觀眾/衆報以熱烈喝採。
samples.pinyin: quán chǎng guān zhòng bào yǐ rè liè hè cǎi
samples.en: The whole audience greeted it with enthusiastic cheers.

samples.sentence: 他受到熱烈的鼓掌歡迎。
samples.pinyin: tā shòudào rèliè de gǔzhǎng huānyíng.
samples.en: He was greeted with rapturous applause.

samples.pinyin: guānzhòng huānxiào bìngqiě gǔzhǎng.
samples.en: The audience laughed and applauded.

samples.sentence: 全場觀眾/衆起立為他謝幕。
samples.pinyin: quán chǎng guān zhòng qǐ lì wèi tā xiè mù
samples.en: The whole audience stood up to applaud him (as he took a curtain call).

samples.meaning: answer a curtain call; respond to a curtain call; acknowledge the applause
samples.pinyin: duō cì xiè mù
samples.en: Respond to repeated curtain calls

samples.sentence: 這首歌感動所有觀眾/衆。
samples.pinyin: zhè shǒu gē gǎndòng suǒyǒu guānzhòng.
samples.en: This song touched all the audience.
samples.vi: Bài hát này đã cảm động khán giả.

samples.pinyin: tā de nǔlì gǎndòngle dàjiā.
samples.en: His efforts moved everyone.
samples.vi: Nỗ lực của anh ấy cảm động mọi người.

samples.meaning: Taidong or Taitung city and county in Taiwan
samples.pinyin: Wǒ jìhuà qù Táidōng lǚyóu.
samples.en: I plan to travel to Taitung.
samples.vi: Tôi dự định đi du lịch Đài Đông.

samples.pinyin: tā zhàn qǐlái dàshēng lǎngdú.
samples.en: He stood up and read aloud.

samples.pinyin: wǒ měitiān dōu liànxí lǎngdú.
samples.en: I practice reading aloud every day.
